# Spearmint Documentation

Welcome to Spearmint — your Personal CFO that runs on your own infrastructure.

## What is Spearmint?

Spearmint is a self-hosted financial management platform that brings business-grade accounting intelligence to personal finance. Unlike simple expense trackers, Spearmint understands the difference between your monthly grocery bill and a kitchen renovation, giving you a true picture of your financial health.

**[→ Learn more about Spearmint](getting-started/what-is-spearmint.md)**

## Why Spearmint?

| Challenge | Traditional Apps | Spearmint |
|-----------|-----------------|-----------|
| $15k renovation | "You're way over budget!" | Separated as Capital Investment |
| Work trip reimbursement | Counted as personal spending | Tracked as Receivable |
| Transfer between accounts | Double-counted or confusing | Auto-detected and excluded |
| Forecasting | Basic or none | Statistical models with confidence intervals |
| Your data | Stored on their servers | Stored on YOUR hardware |

---

*Spearmint is open-source software. Your finances, your hardware, your control.*
